\tzpentry{ID4617}{Cyto Holonomy Number Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4617 introduces Cyto Holonomy Number Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \mathbb{N}_{\text{cyto}} := \oint_{\partial T^2} \Psi(x, y)\, d\phi \]
